assignments.label: Basemap archive
assignments.description: Pre-tiled vector or raster basemap delivered as a single range-requestable archive.
notes: PMTiles is the publication format for the bounded civic basemap.
If PMTiles hosting is unavailable, a static GeoJSON fallback ships the bounded shape only.

assignments.label: Bulk query read model
assignments.description: Tabular features and attributes for DuckDB-WASM, Data Lab, and bulk consumers.
notes: GeoParquet is preferred for any read model larger than a few thousand features.
The civic objects JSON fixture is the current fallback until GeoParquet export lands.

assignments.label: Viewport packet
assignments.description: Range-streamed feature delivery for mid-zoom mobile and desktop overlays.
notes: FlatGeobuf is preferred when the host supports range requests.
Scene packets ship with a JSON fallback that mirrors the FlatGeobuf payload schema.

assignments.label: Runtime transfer
assignments.description: In-memory transfer between worker and main thread, or between DuckDB-WASM and the renderer.
notes: Arrow IPC streams flow over postMessage between workers and the renderer.
Runtime transfer is not a publication format and has no public URL.

assignments.label: Fixture fallback
assignments.description: Repo-checked-in static fixtures for tests, validators, and offline review.
notes: They never carry private fields listed in PRIVACY.md.

assignments.label: Dossier record
assignments.description: Per-object civic record for residents and reviewers.
notes: Dossier records stay JSON to keep them human-readable.
They are linked from each civic object's dossier_url.
This manifest names the role each ReadModelFormat plays in the public atlas.
Catalog URLs continue to live in read-model-catalog.json.
Fallback URLs use repo-relative paths in this fixture and resolve against the atlas data origin in production.
